2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

332 KNES - Kinesiology

KNES355 Sport Management (3 Credits)

Application of concepts and issues related to management principles and business concerns across various sections of the sport industry. Principles pertaining to the management of sport organizations. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in KNES287.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the SPHL-Kinesiology department; and must have earned a minimum of 75 credits.
